## Description

What needs to be done?

## Definition of Done

Checklist of requirements for this task to be considered complete:

- [ ] Models created/updated
- [ ] Migrations generated
- [ ] Forms/Schemas created
- [ ] Admin pages added
- [ ] API endpoints added
- [ ] Validation and error handling
- [ ] Feature flag enforcement
- [ ] Permission enforcement
- [ ] Audit logging for meaningful actions
- [ ] Tests written and passing
- [ ] Documentation updated

- **Module:** (e.g. POS, Inventory, Analytics)
- **Depends on:** #issuenumber
- **Blocks:** #issuenumber

## Notes

Any implementation notes, design decisions, or references.
